# @jfmoe/smart-search 0.7.1

## xAI Responses reliability

- Consumes xAI Responses through SSE and aggregates only the terminal `response.completed` payload.
- Retries explicit failed, incomplete, or prematurely ended response streams instead of returning partial output.
- Uses the same streaming provider path for the primary Responses doctor probe.

## Agent workflow

- Gives Smart Search CLI calls a five-minute deadline in the bundled Skill.
- Requires agents to keep polling a yielded command until terminal exit before reading its output, diagnosing, or retrying.
- Uses a fresh output path for every retry attempt.

## Validation

- Full Python suite: 504 passed, 4 opt-in tests skipped.
- Codex CLI end-to-end search completed through xAI Responses without transport fallback.
- Skill mirror and release metadata checks pass.
